# gsClusterDetect

### Description

An R package for implementing geospatial cluster identification from
time series of counts, by location. Locations can be expressed as
counties, zip codes, census tracts, or other user-defined geographies.
Users provide:

1.  a data.frame of counts by location and date
2.  a distance object, that contains the distance between location and
    its neighbors

The package provides functions to create these distance objects in
either matrix or list format. These can be generated for census tract,
zip codes, or counties (fips), or can be constructed for custom
locations by providing a dataframe with columns for latitude and
longitude (i.e the centroid of each location).

### Installation

Install the `gsClusterDetect` package from CRAN as follows:

``` r
install.packages("gsClusterDetect")
```

Install the development version from Github as follows:

[![development branch checks
(dev)](https://github.com/lmullany/gsClusterDetect/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg?branch=dev&event=push)](https://github.com/lmullany/gsClusterDetect/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

``` r
devtools::install_github("lmullany/gsClusterDetect", branch = "dev")
```

### Getting Started:

1.  Load the package and provide data frame with `location`, `date`, and
    `count` columns.

``` r
library(gsClusterDetect)
df <- example_count_data
tail(df)

   location       date count
     <char>     <IDat> <int>
1:    39171 2025-02-04     1
2:    39171 2025-02-05     0
3:    39173 2025-02-04     6
4:    39173 2025-02-05     7
5:    39175 2025-02-04     2
6:    39175 2025-02-05     0
```

2.  Generate the distance matrix for this location. In this case, the
    synthetic data has counts from counties/fips in the state of OHIO,
    so we use
    [`county_distance_matrix()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/county_distance_matrix.md)
    and pass the state abbreviation:

``` r
ohio_dm <- county_distance_matrix("OH")

# This is named list of two elements
cat("Class:", class(ohio_dm), "\nNames:", names(ohio_dm))

Class: list 
Names: loc_vec distance_matrix
```

3.  Set the end of your target period. This is called the `detect_date`,
    and is a parameter that must be passed to the `find_clusters`
    function. Typically, this might be the current (or last available)
    date.

``` r
detect_date <- max(df[, date])
```

4.  Call the
    [`find_clusters()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/find_clusters.md)
    function; See `?find_clusters()` for full set of options. Note that
    below, we pass the minimum required elements: `cases`,
    `distance_matrix`, `detect_date`, and set the `distance_limit` (the
    maximum size of the clusters) to 50 (miles).

``` r
clusters <- find_clusters(
    cases = df,
    distance_matrix = ohio_dm[["distance_matrix"]],
    detect_date = detect_date,
    distance_limit = 50
)
```

### Contacts:

- Luke Mullany <Luke.Mullany@jhuapl.edu>
- Howard Burkom <Howard.Burkom@jhuapl.edu>

Copyright 2026 The Johns Hopkins University Applied Physics Laboratory
LLC.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_location_counts()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/add_location_counts.md)
  : Add location counts to cluster location list
- [`add_spline_threshold()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/add_spline_threshold.md)
  : Use spline lookup to restrict \`ObservedExpectedGrid\` to potential
  clusters
- [`check_vars()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/check_vars.md)
  : check for variables in frame
- [`compress_clusters()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/compress_clusters.md)
  : Compress a cluster_alert_table
- [`compress_clusters_fast()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/compress_clusters_fast.md)
  : Fast version of compress clusters
- [`counties`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/counties.md)
  : County Location Dataset
- [`county_distance_matrix()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/county_distance_matrix.md)
  : Get distance matrix for counties within a state
- [`create_custom_dist_list()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/create_custom_dist_list.md)
  : Create a sparse distance list from custom location data
- [`create_dist_list()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/create_dist_list.md)
  : Generalized distance list as sparse list
- [`custom_distance_matrix()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/custom_distance_matrix.md)
  : Build a Distance Matrix from a Custom Data Frame
- [`example_count_data`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/example_count_data.md)
  : Example Count Dataset
- [`find_clusters()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/find_clusters.md)
  : Find clusters
- [`gen_nearby_case_info()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/gen_nearby_case_info.md)
  : Return baseline and test period case grids restricting by distance
- [`generate_case_grids()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/generate_case_grids.md)
  : Get candidate clusters and locations in baseline intervals
- [`generate_heatmap()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/generate_heatmap.md)
  : Generate heatmap of data
- [`generate_heatmap_data()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/generate_heatmap_data.md)
  : Get heat map data from a set of location, date, count data
- [`generate_observed_expected()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/generate_observed_expected.md)
  : Generate the observed and expected information
- [`generate_summary_table()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/generate_summary_table.md)
  : Summary count-by-location-and-date data, given baseline and test
  interval lengths, and an end-date for the test interval
- [`generate_time_series_data()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/generate_time_series_data.md)
  : Generate time series data
- [`generate_time_series_plot()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/generate_time_series_plot.md)
  : Generate timeseries plot data
- [`get_baseline_dates()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/get_baseline_dates.md)
  : Generate baseline dates vector
- [`get_nearby_locations()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/get_nearby_locations.md)
  : Get nearby locations
- [`get_test_dates()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/get_test_dates.md)
  : Generate test dates vector
- [`reduce_clusters_to_min()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/reduce_clusters_to_min.md)
  : Filter clusters on minimum overall count
- [`spline_001`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/spline_001.md)
  : Spline Lookup Table - 0.001
- [`spline_005`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/spline_005.md)
  : Spline Lookup Table - 0.005
- [`spline_01`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/spline_01.md)
  : Spline Lookup Table - 0.01
- [`spline_05`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/spline_05.md)
  : Spline Lookup Table - 0.05
- [`st_injects()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/st_injects.md)
  : Add data counts for parameterized injected clusters
- [`tract_distance_matrix()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/tract_distance_matrix.md)
  : Build a Tract Distance Matrix for a State
- [`tract_generator()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/tract_generator.md)
  : Generate Census Tract Centroids for a State
- [`us_distance_matrix()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/us_distance_matrix.md)
  : Get distance matrix for all counties in the US
- [`zip_distance_matrix()`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/zip_distance_matrix.md)
  : Get distance matrix for zip codes within a state
- [`zipcodes`](https://lmullany.github.io/gsClusterDetect/reference/zipcodes.md)
  : Zipcode Location Dataset
